description: Unique and rare, this fully renovated 3-level split townhouse offers the feel of a detached home in a 22-unit boutique strata. A superb layout features a spacious entry with mud room, generous living and dining areas with fireplace opening to a balcony overlooking a peaceful ravine. The sleek kitchen offers granite counters, newer appliances and abundant cabinetry. The primary bedroom includes walk-in closet, ensuite with dual sinks, tub & shower. Flexible lower level with rec room, bedroom, bath and workshop. Features: on-demand combi-boiler (hot water & in-floor heating), poly-B replaced, built-in vacuum, ground-floor security  shutters, Tesla charger.  2 balconies, patio, double garage, locker. Walk to shops, parks, RC Hospital & SkyTrain, bus. Move-in ready!  OH Sat, Feb 21st, 2-4 pm
